name: Recipe Name
description: A short description of the dish.
steps: Season chicken with paprika, salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe pan over medium-high heat.
Sear chicken for 3 minutes per side until golden.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Transfer pan to oven and bake for 20 minutes until cooked through.

name: Beef & Bell Pepper Pasta
description: A quick and hearty pasta with ground beef, bell peppers, and spinach in a rich tomato sauce. Great for meal prep.
steps: Cook pasta according to package instructions, then set aside.
Brown ground beef in a pan over medium-high heat, drain excess fat.
Add garlic and bell peppers, cook for 3-4 minutes.
Pour in pasta sauce and simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in spinach and cook for 1 minute until wilted.
Toss with pasta and top with parmesan.

name: Ground Beef Chili
description: A high-protein, filling chili that batch cooks easily and keeps all week. Serve with rice or on its own.
steps: Brown ground beef in a large pot, drain excess fat.
Add garlic and bell peppers, cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add kidney beans, diced tomatoes, tomato paste, and all spices.
Stir well and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 30-40 minutes. Alternatively, transfer to a slow cooker and cook on low for 6 hours.
Serve with rice or on its own.
